allow: PowerShell($xmlPath = "C:\\Users\\b\\.nuget\\packages\\microsoft.extensions.identity.core\\10.0.2\\lib\\net10.0\\Microsoft.Extensions.Identity.Core.xml"; if \(Test-Path $xmlPath\) { Select-String -Path $xmlPath -Pattern "PasskeyData|UserPasskey|IdentityPasskey" | Select-Object -First 30 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Trim\(\) } } else { ls "C:\\Users\\b\\.nuget\\packages\\microsoft.extensions.identity.core\\10.0.2\\lib\\" })

PowerShell($xmlPath = "C:\\Users\\b\\.nuget\\packages\\microsoft.extensions.identity.stores\\10.0.2\\lib\\net10.0\\Microsoft.Extensions.Identity.Stores.xml"; if \(Test-Path $xmlPath\) { Select-String -Path $xmlPath -Pattern "IdentityPasskeyData|IdentityUserPasskey" | Select-Object -First 30 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Trim\(\) } } else { ls "C:\\Users\\b\\.nuget\\packages\\microsoft.extensions.identity.stores\\" })
